news.title: Bitcoin trades near $62,000; inflation, geopolitical risks remain key market drivers
news.description: Bitcoin rebounded near $62,000 after recovering from last week's lows, supported by optimism over Federal Reserve policy. Ethereum and major altcoins also gained, though investors remain cautious amid inflation, geopolitical tensions, energy prices and mixed ETF investment flows.

news.title: Gold’s sharp correction: What lies ahead for prices?
news.description: Gold has corrected sharply from record highs as a stronger US dollar, elevated bond yields and expectations of prolonged higher interest rates weighed on prices.
